task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings screen in the Sygic app showing 'Distance' or 'Distance units' selected as 'Miles' or 'Imperial'.
A settings screen in the Sygic app showing 'Temperature' selected as 'Fahrenheit' or '°F'.

task_completion.description: Set GPS coordinate format to DMS
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings screen in the Sygic app showing 'GPS coordinates' or 'Coordinate format' selected as 'Degrees, Minutes, Seconds' or 'DMS'.
A settings screen in the Sygic app showing 'Time format' selected as '12-hour' or 'AM/PM'.

task_completion.description: Set color scheme to Night mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings screen in the Sygic app showing 'Color scheme', 'Theme', or 'Map colors' selected as 'Night' or 'Dark'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to modify the app's preferences.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal emulator or command-line interface is visible modifying the app's XML files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor is open showing the 'com.sygic.aura_preferences.xml' file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Sygic GPS Navigation app GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Sygic app interface and its internal settings menus being navigated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura) has specific settings that need to be configured for this task. The VLM should verify that the agent navigated the app's GUI to change the following 5 settings: Distance units to Miles (from Kilometers), Temperature units to Fahrenheit (from Celsius), GPS format to DMS / Degrees, Minutes, Seconds (from Decimal Degrees), Time format to 12-hour (from System default), and Color scheme/Theme to Night mode (from Automatic). These settings are typically found in the Regional, View & Units, or Display settings menus of the app.
